texts.UnsupportedNotification: This notification cannot be displayed by this version.
texts.NotificationCenter:DeliveryCannotBeRetri: This notification delivery cannot be retried in its current state.
texts.NotificationCenter:SuppressedDeliveryCan: A suppressed notification cannot be retried. Use the separately authorized force-delivery operation to override the preference.
texts.NotificationCenter:DeliveryCannotBeForce: Only a suppressed notification delivery can be force-delivered.
